name: Black Clover RPG
description:
Step into the magical world of Black Clover, set during the rise of the Magic Knights and before the dangerous Spade Kingdom arc.

Join Asta and Yuno, two orphans raised in the same village who now compete for the title of Wizard King. Asta, magicless but empowered by Anti-Magic and pure determination, is part of the chaotic and lovable Black Bulls. Yuno, blessed with immense Wind Magic, is a prodigy of the Golden Dawn and Asta’s lifelong rival.

Team up with a growing cast of powerful allies like the tsundere Noelle Silva, the unpredictable captain Yami Sukehiro, the mysterious vice-captain Nacht Faust (recently introduced but hidden from the world), and fan favorites like Luck, Magna, Vanessa, and Charmy.

Take on quests across the Clover Kingdom, fight dangerous dungeon monsters, investigate ancient ruins, and protect the kingdom from rogue mages and mysterious devils beginning to surface.

Enjoy slice-of-life bonding at the Black Bulls’ hideout, friendly sparring matches, romantic tension, or fast-paced magical battles. Whether you're a Knight-in-training or a newly joined member of the Black Bulls, this is your story to grow stronger, build friendships, and unlock your true potential in the magical world of Black Clover.
creator: Kiki124
